title: 1: Code Maintainability
1.1: Adds a post_build method to IE_Base in scapy/contrib/gtp.py that auto-computes the length field when it is None

1.2: Uses ShortField with a default of None for the length field in all 35 existing IE classes (including IE_IMSI, IE_Cause, IE_EPSBearerID, IE_MEI, IE_RAT, IE_FTEID, IE_PCO, IE_EPCO, IE_PAA, IE_ServingNetwork, ...) in scapy/contrib/gtp_v2.py
1.3: Renames IE_IPv4 to IE_IP_Address in scapy/contrib/gtp_v2.py
1.4: Updates the IEType dictionary entry for type 74 to reflect the renamed IE_IP_Address class
1.5: Adds IPv6 support to IE_IP_Address with a conditional address6 field
1.6: Adds IE_MMContext_EPS class with ietype 107 in scapy/contrib/gtp_v2.py
1.7: Adds IE_PDNConnection class with ietype 109 in scapy/contrib/gtp_v2.py
1.8: Adds IE_FQDN class with ietype 136 in scapy/contrib/gtp_v2.py
1.9: Adds GTPV2ContextRequest command class bound to GTPHeader with gtp_type 130
1.10: Adds GTPV2ContextResponse command class bound to GTPHeader with gtp_type 131
1.11: Adds GTPV2ContextAcknowledge command class bound to GTPHeader with gtp_type 132
1.12: Adds an extraPadding conditional field to GTPPDUSessionContainer in scapy/contrib/gtp.py
1.13: Introduces a new PCO_Protocol base class in scapy/contrib/gtp_v2.py inheriting from Packet

1.14: Re-parents all 23 protocol-type PCO classes (including PCO_IPCP, PCO_PPP, PCO_DNS_Server_IPv4, PCO_DNS_Server_IPv6, PCO_SOF, PCO_S_Nssai, PCO_Session_AMBR, PCO_P_CSCF_IPv6_Address_Request, PCO_IM_CN_Subsystem_Signaling_Flag, PCO_IP_Allocation_via_NAS, ...) to inherit from PCO_Protocol instead of PCO_Option
1.15: Adds a post_build method to PCO_Option for auto-computing the length byte of option-type PCO entries
1.16: Reworks PCO_S_Nssai to use conditional fields SST, SD, Hplmn_Sst, Hplmn_Sd instead of a generic packet list
1.17: Reworks PCO_Session_AMBR to use specific fields dlunit, dlambr, ulunit, ulambr instead of a generic packet list

1.18: Replaces the len_options callback with lambda pkt: pkt.length in all 4 PCO classes that used it (PCO_QoS_Rules_With_Support_Indicator, PCO_QoS_Flow_Descriptions_With_Support_Indicator, PCO_Qos_Rules, PCO_QoS_Flow_Descriptions) in scapy/contrib/gtp_v2.py
2: Documentation Maintainability
2.1: Adds a docstring to the LenField class in scapy/fields.py documenting its auto-fill behavior
3: Artifact Cleanup
3.1: Removes the unused FieldLenField import from scapy/contrib/gtp_v2.py
4: Negative Rubrics
4.1: Modifies test files in the repository
4.2: Introduces syntax errors in modified source files
4.3: Removes existing IE class definitions that were present before the refactor
